chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH KARACHI Cr. Misc. A. No. 354 of 2025 Date Order with Signature of Judge 1.For hearing of case 2.For hearing of MA No.5896/25 18.08.2025 Mr. Muteeullah, advocate for complainant Ms. Amna Ansari, APG ---------- None present for the appellant. No intimation is received. Same was the case on last date of hearing. This Criminal Misc. Application is dismissed for non-prosecution. J U D G E Ashraf
